provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content:
1. Short title
This Act may be cited as the Botswana Stock Exchange (Transition) Act.

provisions.title: Interpretation

definitions.definition: the board of Directors of the Company referred to under section 5
the Exchange as continued under section 3
the date on which Botswana Stock Exchange is registered as a company
the Botswana Stock Exchange established under the Botswana Stock Exchange Act
a plan established under section 6 for the benefit of staff of the Company who are citizens
a company established by the Government for the purpose of holding assets from or in respect of, privatised public enterprises, with the object of the economic empowerment of citizens of Botswana
the Botswana Stock Exchange Staff Pension Fund which is a defined contribution fund
the Registrar of Companies appointed under the Companies Act (Cap. 42:01)
the Non-Bank Financial Institutions Regulatory Authority established under section 6 of the Non-Bank Financial Institutions Regulatory Authority Act (Cap. 46:08)
